name: Saucy Black Bean Chicken Stirfry
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chicken breast into bite-sized pieces.
2. Mix all ingredients for the marinade together and place the chicken pieces in the marinade for at least 1 hour, preferably longer.
3. Meanwhile, make the sauce by combining all ingredients in a small bowl and mince all seasonings listed below.
4. Once the chicken has marinated, stir-fry it in a hot wok that has been coated with a tablespoon of smoking oil.
5. Cook until the chicken is completely cooked and golden brown.
6. Pour in the sauce and continue cooking until it thickens slightly.
7. Transfer to a warm serving bowl and serve.
